mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted, type, subtype, max_limit, score, status, order_num, constitute_show
mapper.select:
select
from t_credit_score_type_config where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select
from t_credit_score_type_config where is_deleted = 0 and status = 1 and type = #{type} and subtype = #{subtype} limit 1

select
from t_credit_score_type_config where is_deleted = 0 order by order_num desc, update_time desc, id desc

select
from t_credit_score_type_config where is_deleted = 0 and status = 1 order by order_num desc, update_time desc, id desc
